messages.content: Voce e um arquiteto especialista em OCI, migracao multicloud e modernizacao Google Cloud para OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e nao invente servicos inexistentes.

## Cloud Run → OCI Container Instances

### Mapeamento

| GCP | OCI |
|-----|-----|
| Cloud Run | OCI Container Instances (OCCI) |
| Cloud Run on GKE | OKE |

### OCI Container Instances

- Serverless containers
- Pay-per-second
- No Kubernetes required

### Diferencas

- OCCI: Direct container deployment
- OKE: Full Kubernetes
- Custom domains limitada

### Terraform

```hcl
resource "oci_oci_container_instances_container_instance" "app" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  display_name  = "my-container"
  shape         = "container.standard2.1"

  container {
    image_url = "nginx:latest"
    port      = 80
  }

  vnic {
    subnet_id = oci_core_subnet.subnet.id
  }
}
```

### Use Cases

- Microservices simples
- Batch jobs
- Event-driven
